description: Transform the bilingual safety document at /home/ga/Documents/forklift_safety_raw.docx into a side-by-side comparison table. The source document contains 7 English rules followed by 7 Spanish translations. Create a 2-column table with headers 'English' and 'Español' using the 'Table Heading' style, aligning each English rule horizontally with its corresponding Spanish translation. The final document should contain the table with visible borders and no remaining original list text. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/forklift_safety_aligned.docx.
